posts.text:
The AI lobby has spent millions of dollars on today's Democratic primary elections in Illinois.

Why?

To buy itself a Congress that will do its bidding.

Video

Trump is realizing he bit off more than he could chew by attacking Iran and unleashing global economic chaos.

Video

Adam Smith’s masterpiece is one of those rare classics that almost everyone knows about, but a very few have actually read.

It is fundamentally misunderstood — yet it's just as important today as it was in 1776. Let me explain. robertreich.substack.com/p/t…
The war in Iran is an American failure. What do we do now? theguardian.com/commentisfre…

Trump promised a cap on credit card rates.

Instead, he delivered a giveaway to credit card companies at your expense.

Former CFPB Director Rohit Chopra (@ChopraUSA) explains.

Video

Who is Trump’s stupidest cabinet member?

It's a tough call, but there’s a clear winner. robertreich.substack.com/p/t…

The Washington Post is reportedly using readers' personal data to set subscription prices.

It's a tactic known as surveillance pricing. 

Former FTC Chair Lina Khan explains.

Video

The pro-Israel, crypto, and AI lobbies have spent $21M+ to influence tomorrow's Illinois primary via innocuously-named Super PACs like "Elect Chicago Women". 

Not a single one of their ads mentions Israel, crypto, or AI.

Citizens United is corrupting our system every day.

It’s fallen out of the news cycle, but Trump’s FBI and Justice Department are still covering up major details in the Epstein files.

Video
So what does Trump do now that he’s cornered in the Strait of Hormuz? robertreich.substack.com/p/s…

The Pentagon was already one of the biggest culprits of waste, fraud, and abuse.

Now we find out Pete Hegseth has been spending our money on steak and lobster?

Video
Who’s Winning from Trump’s War on Iran? Follow the Money. robertreich.substack.com/p/s…

While we’re (rightfully) focused on Iran, there are so many other stories of corruption, criminality, and incompetence that we’re not talking about.

Remember Jeffrey Epstein? Hello?

We break down the week that was with a very special guest (and hero of mine): E. Jean Carroll. piped.video/watch?v=U7a9MnIQ…

Trump is cornered in Iran. So what will he do now? 

I'm curious to hear your thoughts. robertreich.substack.com/p/o…

Today I want to tell you about my favorite sandwich, where to get it, and some other very important information you might not have heard before.

Video

We are in an unnecessary war that the public doesn’t want, without a clear purpose or endgame. 

How should the American people respond? Some thoughts... robertreich.substack.com/p/t…

Trump's Sh*tty War
The Commercial That Brought Down Kristi Noem

Busting up big corporations and tackling Wall Street’s greed.

Getting big money out of politics. 

Strengthening unions and fighting for higher wages.

Medicare for all, paid family leave, universal childcare...

This is the progressive populist agenda we need in America.

Meta paid an effective fed tax rate of 3.5% on its latest tax bill — its lowest on record.

Mark Zuckerberg's net worth just hit $222 billion.

And Meta is pumping $65 million into elections this year to boost AI friendly candidates.

Now it's reportedly planning to lay off 15,000 workers.

Hello?

The AI lobby has spent millions of dollars on today's Democratic primary elections in Illinois.

Why?

To buy itself a Congress that will do its bidding.

Trump's health policy:

-Slash grants for Alzheimer's research by 50%
-Increase production of cancer-linked weedkiller chemical
-Gut protections against forever chemicals
-Throw 7.5M Americans off Medicaid

How does ANY of this Make America Healthy Again?

Trump promised a cap on credit card rates.

Instead, he delivered a giveaway to credit card companies at your expense.

Former CFPB Director Rohit Chopra explains. www.youtube.com/watch?v=vZwV...

Trump’s ICE thugs detained 265 and deported 132 young people that had deportation protections because they fled abuse in their home countries.

The cruelty never ends.

https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/immigrant-youth-eligible-green-card-detained-deported-rcna262515

Meta paid an effective fed tax rate of 3.5% on its latest tax bill — its lowest on record.

Mark Zuckerberg's net worth just hit $222 billion.

And Meta is pumping $65 million into elections this year to boost AI friendly candidates.

Now it's reportedly planning to lay off 15,000 workers.

Hello?

Stuck in an hours-long security line at the airport?

It’s because Senate Republicans blocked Democrats’ bill to fund DHS agencies that don’t conduct immigration enforcement, like TSA.

That’s how dead set they are on allowing ICE to keep terrorizing communities with impunity. Remember this.

I'll be testifying shortly before @epw.senate.gov to discuss how Trump's energy policies benefit Big Oil corporations and rich investors at the expense of our planet and our pocketbooks. I urge you to tune in. www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZlhK...

It's Primary Election Day in Illinois, with a major Senate seat and crucial House seats on the ballot.

If you're an Illinois voter, I urge you to reject the failed centrism of the past — and vote for Democrats who will actually fight for something. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EQzG_TrhyrY

Trump's Iran War has already raised gas prices by 25%.

30-year mortgage rates are back above 6 percent and rising. 

Fertilizer shipping disruptions could soon food prices skyrocketing too.

Trump's lackeys may not be concerned, but millions of ordinary Americans are.
Trump is realizing he bit off more than he could chew by attacking Iran and unleashing global economic chaos.

Washington just passed a “millionaire tax,” after Massachusetts passed its own in 2022.

New Mexico enacted universal childcare last year.

And organizers in Montana and California are advancing a ballot measure that would get corporate money out of politics.

We still have power to fix the system.

Introducing the Spring 2026 Campuswide Commencement Speaker: Professor @rbreich.bsky.social!  Professor Reich is a professor emeritus of the Goldman School of Public Policy here at @ucberkeleyofficial.bsky.social.

@inequalitymedia.bsky.social #UCBerkeley #CalGrad

Adam Smith’s masterpiece is one of those rare classics that almost everyone knows about, but a very few have actually read.

It is fundamentally misunderstood — yet it's just as important today as it was in 1776. Let me explain. https://robertreich.substack.com/p/the-250th-anniversary-of-adam-smiths

“No one gives a sh*t about housing.”

“Affordability is a Democrat scam.”

“If [gas prices] rise, they rise.”

Millions are struggling with the cost of food, housing, and other basic necessities. 70% of U.S. adults say the American Dream is dead.

And this is how Trump responds?

Trump promised to cap credit card interest rates at 10% during his campaign.

After the election? Not a peep.

Instead, his administration has showered credit card companies with favors, tax breaks, and deregulation — all at your expense.

The SAVE Act has nothing to do with stopping voter fraud. It’s a poll tax to stop legal voters from casting their ballots. 

It's how Trump is laying the groundwork to block certification of any election results he doesn’t like.

Tell your senators to vote NO: (202) 224-3121

[@brennancenter.org]
The war in Iran is an American failure. What do we do now? https://www.theguardian.com/commentisfree/2026/mar/12/us-israel-iran-war-trump-american-values

The midterm elections are already underway, with the latest primary taking place tomorrow in Illinois.

If last year's elections are any indication, this November could be brutal for the GOP
Trump is realizing he bit off more than he could chew by attacking Iran and unleashing global economic chaos.
Trump promised a cap on credit card rates. Instead, he delivered a giveaway to credit card companies at your expense. Former CFPB Director Rohit Chopra explains.
It’s fallen out of the news cycle, but Trump’s FBI and Justice Department are still covering up major details in the Epstein files.
The Pentagon was already one of the biggest culprits of waste, fraud, and abuse. Now we find out Pete Hegseth has been spending our money on steak and lobster?
E. Jean Carroll, one of my personal heroes, took on Trump and won. She’s one of the bravest people I’ve met. She shared some thoughts on Trump and Epstein’s awful friendship.
Today I want to tell you about my favorite sandwich, where to get it, and some other very important information you might not have heard before.
We're spending $1 billion per day on war as millions of working people struggle to get by. Meanwhile, America's ultra-rich have never been richer.
It's not just gas prices that are surging thanks to Trump's war. Fertilizer costs could rise too — and send food prices skyrocketing.
Have you seen the commercial that brought down Kristi Noem? It’s even more bizarre than I expected.

Trump and Republicans are spreading lies about SNAP in order to justify cutting the vital food assistance program. Why? So they can give bigger tax breaks to the rich and continue to boost military spending. Here’s what you should know.
